scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix runner && npm install
scripts.update:all: npm update --prefix frontend && npm update --prefix runner && npm update
scripts.start: concurrently "docker compose up redis postgres" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host" "cross-env REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379 node runner/worker.js"
scripts.build: concurrently "docker compose up redis postgres" "cross-env REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379 node runner/worker.js"
